title: oxalis polyrhiza
intro: Oxalis polyrhiza, also known as the water violet or purple wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the wood sorrel family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Oxalis polyrhiza can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
